plan_adherence_notes: All 9 plan steps executed exactly as specified. Test file created at correct location with Seeder+AssumptionProvider pattern matching AssumptionPanel.test.tsx. All 7 test categories (hidden when empty, assumption text format, GIVEN label, individual remove with aria-label, clear all, multiple tags, structural styling) implemented. All 11 tests pass. Minor deduction: step 8 structural styling tests assert on DOM element hierarchy (parentElement, children[1]) which is slightly brittle, but consistent with the plan's intent.
missed_questions: What happens when duplicate variableIds are added? The component uses variableId as React key, which could cause rendering issues.
Should tests verify behavior when AssumptionBar is rendered outside an AssumptionProvider (error boundary / missing context)?
Should keyboard accessibility be tested beyond aria-labels (e.g., tab navigation between remove buttons, Enter/Space activation)?
reason: Execution closely followed the plan, which was well-grounded in thorough research. The test file covers all requested behaviors (rendering, removal, clearing, styling) using established repo patterns (Seeder, renderWithProviders, AssumptionProvider). All 11 tests pass. Missed questions are minor edge cases that don't affect the core value of the test suite.
